headline: Is Capital One Financial Corporation (COF) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is COF a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Capital One Financial Corporation on Valueinvestorsclub.com by compound248. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on COF. Capital One Financial Corporation’s share was trading at $191.91 as of May 1st. headline: Capital One files lawsuit against alleged 'scam campaign' operators — for trademark infringement
summary: Capital One is suing unknown defendants, alleging that they use automated or prerecorded calls posing as representatives for the bank.
